name: Arka
usesInAyurveda: Tridoshic Modulation: Pacifies Vata and Kapha.
mainMedicinalUses: Latex used for localized skin tumors and warts.
Leaves used to treat orthopedic pain.
Flowers used for chronic cough and asthma.
plantProfile: Known as the 'Giant Milkweed', holy to Lord Shiva.
preparationMethods: External application of latex or internal use of flowers.
safetyProfile: LATEX IS TOXIC TO EYES. Internal use must be very small and expert-led.
